title: WOOF - Petco Health & Wellness Company, Inc. Latest Stock News & Market Updates
text: WOOF Stock News and Market Updates. Real-Time News Feed: StockTitan provides comprehensive real-time news feed for WOOF stock covering earnings, strategic announcements, analyst changes, and market developments. Recent Focus Areas: 1) Profitability improvement metrics and EBITDA guidance. 2) Services segment growth and veterinary hospital expansion. 3) Comparable sales trends and merchandise category performance. 4) Balance sheet strengthening and debt reduction initiatives. Major Announcements: Q4 2025 earnings on March 11, 2026 showing profitability turnaround. Full year 2026 guidance provided with cautious optimism on comp sales recovery. Strategic Initiatives: Fresh food expansion through new store freezers. Loyalty program enhancements to drive repeat purchases. Merchandise innovation with new brands and products. Veterinary hospital growth targeting 300+ locations. Market Sentiment: Market sentiment has improved in recent months as investors focus on profitability improvements rather than revenue challenges. Consensus views company as in turnaround phase with reasonable upside if execution continues.
